历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 482 → 440 → 484 → 447 → 470, fluctuating narrowly within the 440–484 range, with a fluctuation range of about 44 positions in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 470, with a generally stable trend in recent years, showing no obvious unilateral upward or downward trend; the university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Chongqing was 41 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 43 in 2025, with a significant reduction to 25 in 2026, a decrease of about 42% compared to 2025, the largest reduction in the past 6 years, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the 2021 Soft Science China University Rankings, and stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, consistently among the top universities nationwide, exerting a strong and sustained attraction for high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria and dormitory management controversies (such as the king crab incident and the lack of dormitory provision for professional master's students), but not involving core issues like academic integrity or enrollment violations, thus having a limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and overall high attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 26 disciplines rated A- or above, covering Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Language and Literature A+, Astronomy A+, Atmospheric Science A+, Geography A+, Geology A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Business Administration A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength, exerting a strong attraction for candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat, and AI-related majors have high attention, highly aligned with Nanjing University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing ordinary college entrance examination is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 137,000 based on historical proportions, a slight decrease of about 1.5% from 2025 (139,500), with a basically stable competition base; the undergraduate batch Physics Category cutoff in 2025 was 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional attraction; the proportion of enrollment in Chongqing is not high, with 43 Physics Category students in 2025 accounting for about 69% of the university's total enrollment plan in Chongqing, a normal proportion for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 470, the significant 42% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (significantly easing competition), the top-tier university level with outstanding disciplinary advantages, and the basically stable total number of candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will significantly move forward to about 352; predicted ranking 352, with a range of 312–392.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College, General Science Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (Zhicheng Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Class
- Software Engineering
- Technical Science Experimental Class (Suzhou Campus)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Economy and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 352, range 312–392, at the forefront of historical rankings. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 312 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Kuang Yaming Class, Computer Science); candidates with rankings around 352 mainly target Tier 2 (Electronic Information, Software Engineering, Technical Science Experimental Class), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near 392 use Tier 3 as a safety net (Engineering Experimental Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class), while striving for Tier 2 majors. Nanjing University's Physics Category has significantly reduced enrollment in 2026, leading to notable changes in the competition landscape. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 138 → 129 → 149 → 159 → 167, showing a gradual slight decline over the years, with a cumulative decline of about 29 positions in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 167, with an annual decline of about 8–10 positions in the past 3 years, with small fluctuations; the university's History Category enrollment plan in Chongqing was 8 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and the 2026 plan increases to 23, an expansion of about 21% compared to 2025, the largest in the past 6 years, increasing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in 2021 and stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, consistently among the top universities in the country, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring History Category candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over cafeteria and dormitory management, but not affecting core academic reputation; Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure, overall high attention, mainly positive exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 26 disciplines were rated A- or above, with History Category-related advantageous disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A-, etc., with top-tier humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended but with differentiation and caution; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing general college entrance examination is about 209,000, with an estimated History Category of about 72,000 based on historical proportions, a slight decrease of about 2% from 2025 (73,400), with a basically stable competition base; the provincial control line for undergraduate batch History Category in 2025 was 438 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region; the proportion of History Category enrollment in Chongqing has been increasing year by year (8 in 2021 → 23 in 2026), reflecting the university's emphasis on History Category students from Chongqing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 167, the 2026 History Category enrollment expansion of 21% (increased competition), the historical trend of gradual slight decline in rankings, the top-tier university level with outstanding humanities and social sciences, and the basically stable total number of candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly to about 188; predicted ranking 188, range 167–209.

- Humanities Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Journalism, History, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 188, range 167–209, in the middle to late section of historical rankings. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 167 focus on Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Humanities Experimental Class); candidates with rankings around 188 focus on Tier 2 (Social Sciences Experimental Class), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near 209 use Tier 3 as a safety (Economics and Management Experimental Class), while also striving for Tier 2 majors. History Category rankings have been declining in recent years and with the 2026 expansion, competition has intensified, so candidates are advised to reasonably assess their own rankings.
